onboarding.desc1: To turn your Cloud-Services device, plug on end of a Type-C Cable into your Cloud-Services device, and the other end plug into the power adapter into a wall outlet.
onboarding.desc2: Plug one end of an Ethernet cable into the Ethernet port on your WiFi router, the another end plug  into the Ethernet port of Cloud-Services
onboarding.desc3:
Find the instruction document in the package box. To connect app to Cloud-Services box, you need to do the following steps: 
 
 1. Scan QR Code 
 
 2. Then enter 6-digit secure code
onboarding.desc4: Save your files and media to Cloud-Services and access them from any device, anywhere.

faqs.a1: Our platform has many competitive advantages. We provide a user-friendly interface to explore and manage your files.

faqs.q3: How to use Graphene Cloud Explorer?
faqs.a3: Your physical wallet probably contains your money, a form of ID, and maybe pictures of your loved ones.
faqs.q4: How can I upgrade my storage?

signin.description: To connect your app to the Graphene Cloud Explorer device, scan the QR code that you can find on the instruction paper in the box. Then enter a 6-digit verification code to log in to your account.
signin.network_failed_desc: Make sure your phone has an active internet connection and checking the network.
signin.initializing_key: Please wait. We are initializing your key and connecting to the cloud.
signin.incorrect_credentials: The password or QR is incorrect, please try again
signin.reachability_message: Unable to reach the server. Make sure the proxy server is running and reachable from the phone.
signin.reachability_localhost: Unable to reach {{targetProxy}}. On a physical device, 127.0.0.1 or localhost points to the phone itself, not your PC or Cloud Box.

zeroknowledge.head: Zero-knowledge encryption
zeroknowledge.passphrase_desc: Enter your desktop 12-word passphrase to enable encrypted file names and contents. Tap Skip if desktop zero-knowledge was never enabled.
zeroknowledge.passphrase_desc_auth: Enter your desktop 12-word passphrase before authentication if this cloud uses zero-knowledge encryption. Tap Skip if this cloud was not created with zero-knowledge encryption.
zeroknowledge.enabled_desc: Passphrase accepted. File names and file bytes will now use zero-knowledge mode.
zeroknowledge.error_desc: The passphrase could not be processed. Enter the same desktop passphrase or tap Skip in the previous step.
zeroknowledge.error_desc_auth: The passphrase could not be processed. Retry sign-in and enter the same desktop passphrase, or use Skip if this cloud does not use zero-knowledge encryption.

cellular.off_desc: Cellular data usage is off. Are you sure you want to use cellular data for this action?
cellular.head: You use cellular connection

details.zero_knowledge_info: Zero-knowledge encryption is enabled, so the server does not have file-type metadata meaning usage by file type (images, documents, audio, etc.) cannot be shown.

qr.camera_usage_desc: This app uses the Camera to scan QR code. Please allow access to Camera from Settings
qr.camera_access_head: "Graphene Cloud Explorer" would like to access Camera
qr.no_access: No access to camera, activate camera permission and lunch app again

popups.remove_file: Are you sure you want to remove this file?
popups.rename_folder_warning: If you change the folder name, all files added to favorites inside the folder will be removed from favorites and if the file was already in the home screen, then that file will be deleted
popups.file_not_downloaded: File not downloaded. Dou you want to download it?
popups.memory_full_desc: Graphene Cloud Explorer memory is already full. Delete unnecessary data to upload a new file.
popups.max_files_warning: The files you select must not be more than 15
popups.connect_new_device_desc: If you want connect new device, your will be disconnected from current device
popups.connection_problem: There was a problem connect to Uup-Cloud. Please try again and make sure the Cloud Box or mobile phone is connected to the Internet.
popups.slow_internet: Your internet connection is slow. Would you like to retry?
popups.auth_failed_desc: Authentication did not complete. The PIN proof or zero-knowledge checksum may not match what the server expects.
popups.device_connection_failed: Please try again and make sure the Cloud Box or device is connected to the Internet and Cloud Box working correctly.
popups.remove_multiple: Are you sure you want to delete these files?

options.save_upload_where: Where do you want to save upload the file?

notifications.upload_failed_body: Something went wrong, please try again

updates.available_desc: There is a new update for Graphene Cloud Explorer, please update the system
updates.success_desc: After the device is updated, you will need to log in to your user profile again.
updates.failed_desc: An error occurred during cloud upload, please try again

upload.max_files_desc: The files you select must not be more than 15
upload.save_where: Where do you want to save upload the file?

welcome.head: Welcome to Uup Cloud
welcome.desc: Sign in/up to continue using Graphene Cloud Explorer

memory.full_desc: Graphene Cloud Explorer memory is already full. Delete unnecessary data to upload a new file.
